_comment: Sources to keep indexed. `corpus-search refresh` walks each one, ingests new or changed files, then embeds any new chunks. Idempotent: unchanged files are skipped automatically. Edit this file freely; no migration needed when you add or remove sources.

sources._comment: A folder of video scene summaries. Each file is one video; chunks are scenes with optional timestamps.
sources.name: creative-library

sources._comment: A folder of briefs. Frontmatter on each file (title, brand, event_at) becomes filterable metadata.
sources.name: team-briefs

sources._comment: Per-source fields: name (label), source (folder), kind (asset tag), pattern (default '**/*.md'), tenant (optional id), enabled (skip without deleting).
sources.name: example-disabled
